summary: Message types and service interfaces for Bubble Tea event flow; display data models (SummaryItem, ChannelItem); Summarize and Refresh service abstractions
notes: Central message vocabulary for Bubble Tea event system. Constants define viewID enum (viewDashboard=0, viewChannels=1). Display models: SummaryItem (ChannelName, Summary, MessageCount, Date, SourceType), ChannelItem (ID, Title, Username, AddedAt, SourceType). Bubble Tea message types (14 total): data msgs (summariesLoadedMsg, channelsLoadedMsg, refreshCompleteMsg, summarizeCompleteMsg carry results from async operations), control msgs (switchViewMsg, loadSummariesMsg, loadChannelsMsg, deleteChannelMsg trigger operations), and operational msgs (addSourceMsg carries wizard completion, sourceAddedMsg signals success, errMsg/errClearMsg handle errors, autoRefreshTickMsg triggers periodic refresh). Service interfaces: SummarizeService (SummarizeUnsummarized, SummarizeFiltered), RefreshService (RefreshAll, RefreshFiltered) abstract calls to internal/summarizer and internal/refresh modules respectively. addStep enum defines wizard states (addStepType, addStepName, addStepURL).
